name: Angel Pillows
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Pecans; coarsely chopped (or coconut flakes)
Coconut flakes; optional (or finely chopped pecans)
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350 degrees. Grease cookie sheets with butter flavored shortening.
Cream the shortening, cream cheese and milk with an electric mixer on medium speed until well blended. Beat in the brown sugar. Beat in the preserves. Combine the flour, baking powder, cinnamon and salt. Mix into the creamed mixture. Stir in the nuts. Drop 2 level tablespoons of dough onto the cookie sheets, placing them about 2 inches apart.
Bake for 14 minutes. Cool on the cookie sheets for 1 minute before removing to wire racks to cool completely before frosting. For the frosting, combine the powdered sugar, preserves and shortening in a small bowl. Beat with an electric mixer until well blended. Frost the cooled cookies; sprinkle with coconut if desired.
